---
title: ""
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/torsa-mukhter-5b06781aa/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/torsamukhter
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:torsamukhter10@gmail.com?subject=Contact%20from%20Portfolio&body=Hi%20Torsa"
---


# Hi, I am Torsa Mukhter

## MSc Business Analytics Student | Data Enthusiast

I am an **MSc Business Analytics student at Dublin City University** with a strong interest in **data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence**.

I enjoy transforming data into meaningful insights using tools such as **Python, SQL, and Power BI**.

---

## What You Will Find in This Portfolio

::: {.portfolio-grid}

::: {.portfolio-card}
### [About Me](about.html)  
Learn more about my background, education, and journey into business analytics.
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
### [Projects](Project/index.html)  
Explore my work in data analysis, machine learning, and real-world datasets.
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
### [Reflection](reflection.html)  
Read about my learning experience, challenges, and growth.
:::

:::

---

## Key Skills & Strengths

::: {.highlight-grid}

::: {.highlight-card}
### 🐍 Python, SQL & Power BI  
Strong skills in data analysis, reporting, and dashboard creation.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### 🤖 Machine Learning & NLP  
Experience applying analytical models to real-world datasets.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### 💼 Business Background  
Background in marketing, administration, and sales consulting.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### 📊 Data-Driven Thinking  
Passion for using data to support better business decisions.
:::

:::
